refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks ensures clarity and targeted verification for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite model/map against ground truth data and stakeholder acceptance criteria for terrain, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Generate and represent the work-zone boundaries and features.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle analysis.
DP2: Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification and terrain segmentation.
DP3: Utilize GIS-based mapping tools for work-zone representation.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle analysis.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle analysis modules.
coupling_check.notes: Sensor fusion approach logically couples terrain and obstacle analysis but maintains modularity; work-zone representation can be separately handled.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data noise affecting analysis accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust fault detection and fallback.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing obstacle classification separately if ML algorithms are introduced to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Central processing and analysis of worksite data including terrain and obstacle analysis and work-zone representation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model/map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates with Safety Services for safety plan integration and updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of worksite mapping functions; low diffusion as core analysis is centralized.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not perform analysis; diffusion risk if analysis logic is duplicated here.
Primarily consumes mapping data; risk if partial analysis is duplicated for operator assistance.
Safety Services uses mapping data for safety alerts but should not perform analysis.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping and analysis in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports safety criticality by clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Interface latency between NGHE Solution and Vehicle for telemetry data.
Risk of insufficient integration with Safety Services for safety plan updates.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution; consider splitting analysis and representation if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear verification paths and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Potential duplication of analysis logic if Vehicle or Teleoperation modules attempt partial processing.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as owner; interfaces are well defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing NGHE Solution outputs against ground truth and stakeholder criteria.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of analysis and mapping functions to NGHE Solution with defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Review interface performance to ensure telemetry data latency is within acceptable limits.
Plan for modularization if NGHE Solution complexity grows.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and allocation meets requirements with acceptable risk and clear ownership; no immediate need to decompose further.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Generate and represent the work-zone boundaries and features.

revise.why: No major issues identified requiring revision at this level.

assumptions: Sufficient processing capacity in NGHE Solution module.
open_risks: Interface latency between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Performance metrics of sensor data processing.
Verification results of worksite model accuracy.
